attempts.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

    Instruction: Place a cooked potato slice inside the refrigerator.
    

SCENE CAPTION:
The scene depicts a kitchen environment with several objects relevant to the planning task. The primary objects of interest are:

1.  **Receptacles:**
    *   **Microwave:** A silver microwave oven is mounted above the countertop. Its door is closed. Through the glass, a red apple is visible inside, indicating it currently holds an object. It is positioned above the stove area. It is an openable receptacle.
    *   **Fridge:** A tall, dark gray refrigerator is visible on the left side of the scene, with its door closed. It is an openable receptacle.
    *   **Sink:** The sink is not visible in any of the provided images. Its presence is inferred from the domain but not confirmed visually.

2.  **Objects:**
    *   **Knife:** A small, metallic knife is visible on the countertop, positioned next to a large, brown-lidded container (possibly a soap dispenser or canister) and to the right of a black pot. It is not currently held by any agent.
    *   **Potato:** A single, small, light-brown potato slice is visible inside the black pot on the countertop. This is the target object for the task. It is not currently held by any agent.
    *   **Black Pot:** A large, black, round pot with two handles sits on the countertop to the left. It contains the potato slice. It is not a receptacle in the domain's context, as it's not listed as one, but it holds the potato slice.
    *   **Cast Iron Skillet:** A black, square cast iron skillet is sitting on the electric stove burner to the right.
    *   **Container:** A cylindrical container with a brown, pump-style lid is on the countertop between the pot and the stove.
    *   **Salt and Pepper Shakers:** Two small, clear shakers with brown tops are behind the container.

3.  **Spatial Relationships and States:**
    *   The potato slice is located inside the black pot, which is on the countertop.
    *   The knife is on the countertop, adjacent to the container.
    *   The microwave is above the stove, and the apple is inside it.
    *   The fridge is to the left of the countertop area.
    *   The stove burner under the skillet is off (not glowing).
    *   The microwave door is closed.
    *   The fridge door is closed.
    *   No agent is present, and no objects are being held.
    *   The potato slice is not yet sliced (it appears as a single piece, but the task requires a "slice"), not heated, and not cooled.

4.  **Visual Properties:**
    *   The countertop is a light beige color.
    *   The cabinets are made of wood with a medium brown finish.
    *   The floor is made of square, brownish-tan tiles.
    *   The walls are a light beige color.
    *   The lighting in the scene is dim, casting soft shadows.

In summary, the scene contains the necessary objects for the task: a potato (in a pot), a knife, a microwave, and a fridge. The potato needs to be sliced, then heated (presumably in the microwave), and finally placed inside the fridge. The initial state is that all objects are stationary and in their default locations, with no actions having been performed yet.

Based on the above scene caption, the images, and the instruction, generate the PDDL problem file.
Use the caption to understand what objects are present and their current state.
Make sure the PDDL problem accurately reflects the scene described in the caption.

Generate the PDDL problem:
attempts.response:
```pddl
(define (problem cook_potato_slice)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        microwave1 - microwave
        fridge1 - fridge
        sink1 - sink
        knife1 - knife
        potato_slice1 - object
        pot1 - object
        apple1 - object
        skillet1 - object
        container1 - object
        salt_shaker1 - object
        pepper_shaker1 - object
    )
    (:init
        ; Agent is not at any location initially
        (not (atLocation agent1 microwave1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 fridge1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 sink1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 knife1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 potato_slice1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 pot1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 apple1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 skillet1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 container1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 salt_shaker1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 pepper_shaker1))

        ; Receptacles are openable
        (openable microwave1)
        (openable fridge1)
        (openable sink1)

        ; Receptacles are initially closed
        (not (opened microwave1))
        (not (opened fridge1))

        ; Objects are in their initial locations
        (inReceptacle apple1 microwave1)
        (inReceptacle potato_slice1 pot1)
        (atLocation agent1 pot1) ; Agent can see the pot, so it's at that location

        ; Objects are not held
        (not (holdsAny agent1))

        ; States of objects
        (not (isClean potato_slice1))
        (not (isHot potato_slice1))
        (not (isCool potato_slice1))
        (not (isOn potato_slice1))
        (not (isToggled potato_slice1))
        (not (isSliced potato_slice1))

        ; The potato slice is not yet sliced, so we need to slice it first
        ; The knife is on the countertop
        (atLocation agent1 knife1) ; Agent can see the knife, so it's at that location
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle potato_slice1 fridge1)
        (isHot potato_slice1)
        (isSliced potato_slice1)
    ))
)
```

(define (problem cook_potato_slice)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        microwave1 - microwave
        fridge1 - fridge
        sink1 - sink
        knife1 - knife
        potato_slice1 - object
        pot1 - object
        apple1 - object
        skillet1 - object
        container1 - object
        salt_shaker1 - object
        pepper_shaker1 - object
    )
    (:init
        ; Agent is not at any location initially
        (not (atLocation agent1 microwave1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 fridge1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 sink1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 knife1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 potato_slice1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 pot1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 apple1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 skillet1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 container1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 salt_shaker1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 pepper_shaker1))

        ; Receptacles are openable
        (openable microwave1)
        (openable fridge1)
        (openable sink1)

        ; Receptacles are initially closed
        (not (opened microwave1))
        (not (opened fridge1))

        ; Objects are in their initial locations
        (inReceptacle apple1 microwave1)
        (inReceptacle potato_slice1 pot1)
        (atLocation agent1 pot1) ; Agent can see the pot, so it's at that location

        ; Objects are not held
        (not (holdsAny agent1))

        ; States of objects
        (not (isClean potato_slice1))
        (not (isHot potato_slice1))
        (not (isCool potato_slice1))
        (not (isOn potato_slice1))
        (not (isToggled potato_slice1))
        (not (isSliced potato_slice1))

        ; The potato slice is not yet sliced, so we need to slice it first
        ; The knife is on the countertop
        (atLocation agent1 knife1) ; Agent can see the knife, so it's at that location
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle potato_slice1 fridge1)
        (isHot potato_slice1)
        (isSliced potato_slice1)
    ))
)

    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

(define (problem cook_potato_slice)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        microwave1 - microwave
        fridge1 - fridge
        sink1 - sink
        knife1 - knife
        potato1 - object
    )
    (:init
        (openable microwave1)
        (openable fridge1)
        (openable sink1)
        (not (opened microwave1))
        (not (opened fridge1))
        (not (opened sink1))
        (inReceptacle potato1 microwave1)
        (not (isHot potato1))
        (not (isSliced potato1))
        (not (isCool potato1))
        (not (isClean potato1))
        (not (isOn microwave1))
        (not (isToggled microwave1))
        (not (isOn fridge1))
        (not (isToggled fridge1))
        (not (isOn sink1))
        (not (isToggled sink1))
        (atLocation agent1 microwave1) ; agent starts near microwave for efficiency
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle potato1 fridge1)
        (isHot potato1)
        (isSliced potato1)
    ))
)

(define (problem cook_potato_slice)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        microwave1 - microwave
        fridge1 - fridge
        sink1 - sink
        knife1 - knife
        potato1 - object
    )
    (:init
        (openable microwave1)
        (openable fridge1)
        (openable sink1)
        (not (opened microwave1))
        (not (opened fridge1))
        (not (opened sink1))
        (inReceptacle potato1 microwave1)
        (not (isHot potato1))
        (not (isSliced potato1))
        (not (isCool potato1))
        (not (isClean potato1))
        (not (isOn microwave1))
        (not (isToggled microwave1))
        (not (isOn fridge1))
        (not (isToggled fridge1))
        (not (isOn sink1))
        (not (isToggled sink1))
        (atLocation agent1 microwave1) ; agent starts near microwave for efficiency
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle potato1 fridge1)
        (isHot potato1)
        (isSliced potato1)
    ))
)
